mapper.select: SELECT customer_id FROM customer WHERE phone = #{phone} LIMIT 1
SELECT customer_id FROM customer WHERE id_card = #{idCard} LIMIT 1
SELECT id_card, customer_name, gender, address, source_channel FROM customer WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO customer ( customer_name, gender, phone, id_card, address, first_visit_date, source_channel ) VALUES ( #{customerName}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{idCard}, #{address}, #{firstVisitDate}, #{sourceChannel} ) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO NOTHING RETURNING customer_id
SELECT model_id FROM model WHERE model_id = #{modelId} LIMIT 1
SELECT staff_id FROM staff WHERE staff_id = #{staffId} LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO customer_intent ( customer_id, model_id, intent_level, remark, staff_id, next_contact_time, created_at ) VALUES ( #{customerId}, #{modelId}, #{intentLevel}, #{remark}, #{staffId}, #{nextContactTime}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) RETURNING intent_id
